metadata.description: The Insight Engine — verification-graded analysis for high-stakes, complex, and wicked problems.

plugins.name: insight-engine
plugins.description: Analysis engine for high-stakes, complex, and wicked problems: proportionality triage, provocation page, source-tiered web verification with disconfirmation, a conditional systems-investigation pass, deep-core routing, a forced judgement gate, an assumption-resilience check, a grade-locked decision brief, audience rendering, and a living investigation workspace.
